class.help: Categoriza las experiencias laborales de un CV.
class.label: Área de experiencia
class.name: AREA_EXP

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_area_exp as oi_area_exp, t0.c_area_exp as c_area_exp, t0.d_area_exp as d_area_exp, SEC.policy, t0.c_area_exp as CODE, t0.d_area_exp as TEXT FROM SDP18_AREAS_EXP as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.SeleccionDePostulantes.Areas_Experiencia.AREA_EXP\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_area_exp LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_area_exp asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_area_exp as oi_area_exp, SEC.policy FROM SDP18_AREAS_EXP as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.SeleccionDePostulantes.Areas_Experiencia.AREA_EXP\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_area_exp LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_area_exp asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.SeleccionDePostulantes.Areas_Experiencia.AREA_EXP.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.SeleccionDePostulantes.Areas_Experiencia.AREA_EXP.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(SDP18_AREAS_EXP.oi_area_exp) as CNT from SDP18_AREAS_EXP Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and SDP18_AREAS_EXP.oi_area_exp={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(SDP18_AREAS_EXP.d_area_exp,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(SDP18_AREAS_EXP.c_area_exp,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW
